name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon (or about 5 teaspoons) quick-mixing flour (such as Wondra)
Salt and black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter and oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions and mushrooms. Cook, stirring occasionally, until tender, about 10 minutes.
2. Sprinkle flour, salt, and pepper over the onions and mushrooms. Stir well. Cook for 1 minute. Slowly add stock, stirring until smooth. Stir in half-and-half, vermouth, and bitters. Reduce to low heat and simmer gently for 10 minutes. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving hot.
Note: This recipe is traditionally served at Northwestern University tailgate parties and is favored by those who enjoy the creamy richness of a mushroom soup to complement the brisk autumn days.
